synced:
[00:14.55] I hate to give the satisfaction asking, "How you're doing now?"
[00:18.41] How's the castle built off people you pretend to care about?
[00:21.73] Just what you wanted
[00:24.41] Look at you, cool guy, you got it
[00:28.87] I see the parties and the diamonds
[00:30.79] Sometimes when I close my eyes
[00:32.70] Six months of torture you sold as some forbidden paradise
[00:36.19] I loved you truly
[00:38.22] You gotta laugh at the stupidity
[00:41.13] 'Cause I've made some real big mistakes
[00:44.98] But you make the worst one look fine
[00:48.75] I should've known it was strange
[00:52.24] You only come out at night
[00:56.00] I used to think I was smart
[00:59.09] But you made me look so naive
[01:03.02] The way you sold me for parts
[01:06.39] As you sunk your teeth into me, oh
[01:11.35] Bloodsucker, dream crusher
[01:15.02] Bleeding me dry like a damn vampire
[01:19.51] 
[01:22.01] And every girl I ever talked to
[01:24.22] Told me you were bad, bad news
[01:25.99] You called them crazy
[01:26.67] God, I hate the way I called them crazy too
[01:29.15] You're so convincing
[01:31.74] How do you lie without flinching?
[01:33.61] (How do you lie? How do you lie? How do you lie?)
[01:35.45] Ooh, what a mesmerizing, paralyzing, tragic little thrill
[01:39.60] Can't figure out just how you do it, and God knows I never will
[01:43.38] Went for me and not her
[01:46.06] 'Cause girls your age know better
[01:48.68] I've made some real big mistakes
[01:51.84] But you make the worst one look fine
[01:55.68] I should've known it was strange
[01:59.02] You only come out at night
[02:02.45] I used to think I was smart
[02:05.66] But you made me look so naive
[02:09.12] The way you sold me for parts
[02:12.85] As you sunk your teeth into me, oh
[02:17.45] Bloodsucker, dream crusher
[02:20.93] Bleeding me dry like a damn vampire
[02:25.59] 
[02:31.69] You said, "It was true love", but wouldn't that be hard?
[02:35.04] You can't love anyone, 'cause that would mean you had a heart
[02:38.89] I tried you help you out, now I know that I can't
[02:42.02] 'Cause how you think's the kind of thing I'll never understand
[02:51.24] I've made some real big mistakes
[02:54.18] But you make the worst one look fine
[02:58.15] I should've known it was strange
[03:01.13] You only come out at night
[03:04.83] I used to think I was smart
[03:07.88] But you made me look so naive
[03:11.75] The way you sold me for parts
[03:14.95] As you sunk your teeth into me, oh
[03:19.77] Bloodsucker, dream crusher
[03:23.22] Bleeding me dry like a damn vampire
[03:25.99]
plain:
I hate to give the satisfaction asking, "How you're doing now?"
How's the castle built off people you pretend to care about?
Just what you wanted
Look at you, cool guy, you got it

I see the parties and the diamonds
Sometimes when I close my eyes
Six months of torture you sold as some forbidden paradise
I loved you truly
You gotta laugh at the stupidity

'Cause I've made some real big mistakes
But you make the worst one look fine
I should've known it was strange
You only come out at night

I used to think I was smart
But you made me look so naive
The way you sold me for parts
As you sunk your teeth into me, oh
Bloodsucker, dream crusher
Bleeding me dry like a damn vampire

And every girl I ever talked to
Told me you were bad, bad news
You called them crazy
God, I hate the way I called them crazy too
You're so convincing
How do you lie without flinching?
(How do you lie? How do you lie? How do you lie?)

Ooh, what a mesmerizing, paralyzing, tragic little thrill
Can't figure out just how you do it, and God knows I never will
Went for me and not her
'Cause girls your age know better

I've made some real big mistakes
But you make the worst one look fine
I should've known it was strange
You only come out at night

I used to think I was smart
But you made me look so naive
The way you sold me for parts
As you sunk your teeth into me, oh
Bloodsucker, dream crusher
Bleeding me dry like a damn vampire

You said, "It was true love", but wouldn't that be hard?
You can't love anyone, 'cause that would mean you had a heart
I tried you help you out, now I know that I can't
'Cause how you think's the kind of thing I'll never understand

I've made some real big mistakes
But you make the worst one look fine
I should've known it was strange
You only come out at night

I used to think I was smart
But you made me look so naive
The way you sold me for parts
As you sunk your teeth into me, oh
Bloodsucker, dream crusher
Bleeding me dry like a damn vampire
